channel.title: SimpleStocks Member Feed Proof
channel.description: Proof of concept feed for SimpleStocks member posts.

item.title: test 2
item.description:
## Trade Update - Ticker: SLV - Current status: Closing - What changed: max gains
! Action: enjoy

item.title: test
item.description:
## Market Read - SPX: - QQQ: - VIX:
## Key Level ! Action: wait for confirmation before pressing size.
## Plan - If price holds: - If price fails:

item.title: test
item.description:
Lack of Pizzazz Headlines from China
Good morning traders.
+ Market Pulse: After a record Thursday, overnight the indices dipped nearly identically to Tuesday. If they were to repeat the behavior, the forecast would be to attempt a 2%+ rebound by Monday. Today there are hurdles in the way near SPY 746 to quote the S&P. Conversely and since the rally has been extended, the indices are vulnerable for continued testing of lower supports.
+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.
+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 646464) Nic NOTE ID: 202605150435 | 0515

item.title: Lack of Pizzazz Headline from China
item.description:
Morning Note — 0515

Good morning traders.

+ Market Pulse: After a record Thursday, overnight the indices dipped nearly identically to Tuesday. If they were to repeat the behavior, the forecast would be to attempt a 2%+ rebound by Monday. Today there are hurdles in the way near SPY 746 to quote the S&P. Conversely and since the rally has been extended, the indices are vulnerable for continued testing of lower supports.

+ Trends update: SPY | QQQ | IWM | VIX | OIL | GOLD.

+ Live discussion, available HERE (PW: 646464)

Nic
NOTE ID: 202605150432 | 0515

item.title: 5/14 test note
item.description:
The 10 year yields just surged. Reasons notwithstanding, this surely squashes the idea of rate cuts this year. Hopefully markets are not counting on those in their pursuit of SPX 8000
nic

item.title: POC Writer Test 2
item.description: This post proves the writer can create a post and trigger Netlify to rebuild the public feed.

item.title: POC Writer Test
item.description: This post was created from the hosted writer to prove the create-post loop works.

item.title: NVDA Gap Fill Note
item.description: NVDA defended the first zone. If buyers hold the retest, the next squeeze can start from here. If it loses the level, stand down.

item.title: Market Open Note
item.description: SPX is holding support. No chase until reclaim. Premium is still elevated, so wait for confirmation before pressing a new entry.

item.title: Earnings Risk Reminder
item.description: High premium is not free money. Earnings trades need defined risk, clear size, and no emotional averaging after the move starts.

item.title: Member Room Note
item.description: Clean entries beat busy screens. If the room is noisy, reduce the chart to the level, the invalidation, and the next decision.

item.title: SPX No Trade Zone
item.description: The best trade is waiting while price chops inside the box. Let the market leave the range before giving it your money.
